releaseNotesMarkdown:
Comparing against published beta build beta-2026.0427.2310
## What's new in this update

### Forge Sync improvements

- Last-check.json artifact + Manual-check dialog can never hang

### Forge Tools improvements

- Patrol(questwright): added Dungeon Alchemy System — ingredients, elixir recipes, crafting methods
- Patrol(ashbane): harden ViewportPosition load reads with NomadFileSystem retry
- Peer(trickster): filter craftable elixirs by ingredient availability
- Forge(wayfinder): enrich idle tip pool and add 3 new contextual tip triggers
- Peer(runesmith): fix two inaccurate idle tips in WayfinderTipEngine
- Elder(lorewyrm): remove duplicate ExportForge idle tip, deduplicate PinForge tip
- Gate all easter-egg particle toys behind EnableEasterEggs

_(+ 4 internal/noise commit(s) hidden)_

### Plugin improvements

_No commits since last build._
